title: Model CR-28 flame cannon

The '''model CR-28 flame cannon''' manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] was a larger version of the regular [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrower]] with a longer range, hotter temperature, and greater fuel capacity.

==Description==
The CR-28 flame cannon was the heaviest of flame projectors. Chiefly a military weapon, the CR-28 needed to be fired from a stable, unmoving platform, mounted on vehicles or fired from a tripod stand. It used a specialized fuel canister for ammunition. Though the weapon was reserved for close quarters, the effects were devastating. The flame cannon shot a large cone of [[Fire/Legends|fire]] 18 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and 12 meters wide at the terminus. Replacement tanks for the flame cannon cost 600 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]] and weighed 20 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] each.<ref name="Galaxy at War" />

[[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]] produced a similar flame weapon, designated the [[CZ-28 Flamestrike flame cannon]].<ref name="Galaxy at War" />

==History==
The [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] mounted the CR-28 on ground vehicles for use in their brutal [[Riot|crowd control]] situations.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology" />
